texto: Today, while fishing a pond in Oregon, this kid told me to come over that there was some bass in the water. So I decided to take a couple casts off the dock, but I didn't catch anything. So I moved over to a bridge that I seen some salmon creek in. Didn't catch anything. What's interesting about this lake is that there's a life vest. So yeah, if you ever want to hop in this beautiful stream here. Kid had to go, but I still didn't catch any bass. Bye.
